_comment: Hand-edited prose used by tools/gen_skill.py to build .claude/skills/margaui/. Keys: short = one-liner shown in SKILL.md component index. what = 1-2 sentence purpose. when = bullet list (markdown) of when to use, with cross-references to near-cousins. classes = primary class + key modifiers. New components default to TODO entries; fill in over time.

accordion.short: collapsible sections (single-open via radio, free via details)
accordion.what: Vertically stacked, expandable sections that show one panel of content at a time.
accordion.when:
- Grouped FAQ-style content where most items stay collapsed.
- For a single show/hide region without grouping, use **collapse** instead.
accordion.classes: `collapse` on each item, all sharing the same `name="…"` (radio inputs) for single-open behavior; modifiers `collapse-arrow`, `collapse-plus`, `join-item` when wrapped in `join`.

alert.short: inline notification box (info / success / warning / error)
alert.what: Inline, non-blocking notification box with an icon and message, optionally with action buttons.
alert.when:
- Persistent feedback inline with content (form errors, status banners).
- For transient pop-ups that auto-dismiss, use **toast** instead.

avatar.short: user picture / placeholder, with optional ring, mask, presence
avatar.what: User-image container with sizing, rounding, ring, mask shape, presence indicator, and group-stack support.
avatar.when:
- Anywhere a user/account is represented.
- Use `avatar-placeholder` when no image is available (renders initials).
- For decorative shape masking on non-avatar images, use **mask** directly.
avatar.classes:
`avatar`; modifiers `avatar-group`, `avatar-placeholder`; inner `` typically wrapped in a sized `
` with `rounded-full` or a `mask mask-…` class.

badge.what: Small chip used for counts, statuses, tags, or labels.
badge.when:
- Inline with text or as a counter on buttons / icons.
- For a colored dot only (no text), use **status** instead.
- For positioned overlays on other elements, wrap in **indicator**.

breadcrumbs.what: Horizontal trail of links showing the user's location in a hierarchy.
breadcrumbs.when:
- Pages nested 2+ levels deep where users may want to jump back to an ancestor.
- Skip on flat / single-level UIs.

button.short: `btn` with color / size / shape / style modifiers
button.what: Primary action element. The `btn` class works on `<button>`, `<a>`, `<input>`, `<label>`, `<div>`, etc.
button.when:
- Any clickable action.
- For navigation-only links inside body text, use **link** instead.
- For floating action buttons, use **fab**.

calendar.short: date picker (uses external Cally web component)
calendar.what: Styled wrapper around the [Cally](https://wicg.github.io/cal-cally/) `<calendar-date>` / `<calendar-range>` web components — margaui supplies the styling, Cally supplies the behavior.
calendar.when:
- Inline date picker or date-range picker.
- Requires loading Cally separately (CDN script tag in the example).

card.short: container with figure, body, title, actions
card.what: Self-contained content card with optional figure (image), body, title, and actions row.
card.when:
- Product tiles, summary panels, pricing tiles, blog post previews.
- For a thin labelled chip, use **badge** instead.

carousel.what: CSS scroll-snap based slideshow. No JS required; navigation via anchor links to `id`-tagged items.
carousel.when:
- Image galleries or feature walkthroughs where the user controls pacing.
- For purely hover-driven image switching, use **hover-gallery**.

chat.what: Speech-bubble layout for messaging UIs, with optional avatar, header, footer.
chat.when: - Conversation transcripts (chat apps, AI chat UIs).

checkbox.what: Themed replacement for the native checkbox.
checkbox.when:
- Multi-select / boolean form fields.
- For a sliding on/off switch, use **toggle**.

collapse.what: Single expandable region driven by `<details>`, a checkbox, or focus.
collapse.when:
- One-off show-more / read-more sections.
- For grouped single-open behavior across many items, use **accordion**.

countdown.short: animated digit transitions for timers / clocks
countdown.what: Animates between digits using CSS counters and `--value`. Works for clocks, timers, large stat displays.
countdown.when: - Live countdown timers, clocks, animated number reveals.

diff.short: side-by-side image/text comparison with draggable handle
diff.what: Two-pane comparison with a draggable resizer.

divider.short: horizontal / vertical separator with optional label
divider.what: Separator line with optional centered text and optional color.
divider.when: - Visually separating form sections, content blocks, sidebar groups.

dock.what: Fixed bottom navigation bar with icon + label items.
dock.when:
- Primary mobile/touch navigation.
- For top navigation, use **navbar**.

drawer.what: Sliding off-canvas sidebar driven by a hidden checkbox — works without JS.
drawer.when:
- Mobile menus, side panels that overlay content.
- For an always-visible navigation column, use **menu** in a flex layout instead.
drawer.classes: `drawer`; `drawer-toggle` on the checkbox; `drawer-content`, `drawer-side`, `drawer-overlay`; modifier `drawer-end` for right-side drawer; `drawer-open` to keep open by default.

dropdown.short: click/hover/focus menu attached to a trigger
dropdown.what: Pop-up menu attached to a button/element. Supports details/summary, focus-based, popover API, and anchor positioning variants.
dropdown.when:
- Action menus, settings menus, navbar sub-menus.
- For full-screen modals, use **modal** instead.

fab.what: Floating action button with optional speed-dial children.
fab.when: - Single primary action floating over scrollable content (compose, add).

fieldset.short: themed `<fieldset>` group with legend + label slots
fieldset.what: Themed grouping container for related form inputs with `fieldset-legend` and helper `fieldset-label`.
fieldset.when: - Logical groupings of form fields (login form, address form section).

filter.what: Group of mutually exclusive `<input type="radio">` options styled as buttons, with a built-in reset.

footer.what: Page footer layout — columns of links, optional logo block, optional form, optional copyright row.

hero.short: full-width banner section (centered or with figure)
hero.what: Full-width banner section, optionally with a figure beside the text or an overlay image.

hover-3d.what: CSS-only 3D tilt-on-hover for cards and images.

hover-gallery.short: swap images by hovering across regions
hover-gallery.what: Image gallery that swaps the displayed image based on the horizontal hover position.
hover-gallery.when:
- Product image galleries on listing pages.
- For user-paced slideshows, use **carousel**.

indicator.short: wrap an element to overlay a badge / status / button at a corner
indicator.what: Wrapper that positions a child element (typically a **badge**, **status**, or small button) at one of nine alignment points relative to its content.
indicator.when: - Notification counters on icons, presence dots on avatars, 'new' tags on cards.

input.what: Themed wrapper for `<input>` with optional inner icon, label, and **validator** support.
input.when:
- Any single-line text input (text, email, search, password, number, date, etc.).
- For multi-line, use **textarea**.
- For dropdowns, use **select**.

join.short: group adjacent items so borders/radii merge
join.what: Layout helper that strips inner borders/radii so children render as one fused control (button group, segmented control, input + button).
join.when: - Button groups, segmented controls, input-with-button combos.
join.classes: `join` on the wrapper; `join-item` on each child; modifier `join-vertical|horizontal`.

kbd.what: Renders text as a keyboard key.
kbd.when: - Documenting keyboard shortcuts inline with text.

label.what: Themed label, including a floating-label variant.

link.when:
- Inline anchors in body text.
- For action-style links rendered as buttons, use **button** with `btn-link`.

list.what: Vertical list where each row is a multi-column layout (image + text + actions).
list.when: - Compact rows of records (chat list, file list, settings list).

loading.short: loading spinner / dots / bars / ring / ball / infinity
loading.what: Inline loading indicator with several visual styles.
loading.when:
- Pending async operations, skeleton-less loading states.
- For content-shaped placeholders, use **skeleton**.
loading.classes: `loading`; style `loading-spinner|dots|ring|ball|bars|infinity`; size `loading-xs|sm|md|lg|xl`; color via standard `text-primary|…` utilities.

mask.short: clip an element to a shape (circle, hex, star, …)
mask.what: CSS mask utilities to clip an element (typically an image) to a shape.
mask.when:
- Decorative image shaping, avatar shaping.
- For avatars specifically, use **avatar** (which composes mask).

menu.what: Versatile nav list for sidebars, sub-menus, mega-menus, file trees.
menu.when: - Sidebars, dropdown contents, mobile drawer contents.

mockup-code.what: Visual code-block / terminal frame with optional line prefix and highlighted line.
mockup-code.when: - Showing code snippets in a styled frame.

mockup-window.when: - Marketing screenshots, demo previews of desktop UIs.

modal.what: Pop-up dialog. Preferred form is the native `<dialog>` variant; legacy variants use a hidden checkbox or anchor link.
modal.when:
- Confirmations, focused tasks that interrupt the page flow.
- For non-blocking notifications, use **toast** or **alert**.
- For lighter inline reveals, use **dropdown**.

navbar.short: top navigation bar with start/center/end slots
navbar.when:
- Top-of-page navigation.
- For mobile-style bottom nav, use **dock**.

pagination.what: Row of buttons (often inside `join`) for paged navigation.

progress.what: Themed `<progress>` bar; supports indeterminate state when `value` is omitted.
progress.when:
- Determinate progress (uploads, downloads, multi-step forms).
- For circular progress, use **radial-progress**.
- For pure spinners, use **loading**.

radial-progress.what: Circular progress indicator driven by CSS custom properties (`--value`, `--size`, `--thickness`).
radial-progress.when:
- Compact circular progress, dashboards, KPIs.
- For linear progress, use **progress**.
radial-progress.classes: `radial-progress` with `style="--value:N"` (and optional `--size`, `--thickness`); colors via standard `text-…`/`bg-…` utilities.

radio.what: Themed replacement for the native radio button.
radio.when:
- Single-choice form fields with all options visible.
- For dropdown single-choice, use **select**.

range.when: - Numeric ranges where exact precision is less important than feel.

rating.what: Star/heart rating built from masked radio inputs.
rating.when:
- Product / content ratings.
- For read-only display, set `disabled` on the inputs.
rating.classes: `rating`; size `rating-xs|sm|md|lg|xl`; modifier `rating-half`; child inputs use `mask mask-star|heart|…`.

select.when:
- Single-choice form fields with many options.
- For visible single-choice (few options), use **radio**.

skeleton.what: Animated content-shaped placeholder for loading states.
skeleton.when:
- Loading states where you want the layout to pre-fill (lists, cards).
- For abstract spinners, use **loading**.

stack.what: Stacks children on top of each other (Z-axis), with optional offset/spread for card-stack effects.

stat.what: Metric/KPI tile with title, value, description, and optional icon/figure/actions.

status.what: Small colored dot for status indication (online, busy, etc.), with optional bounce/ping animation.
status.when:
- Presence dots, system-health indicators.
- For text + dot, combine with **badge** or **indicator**.

swap.short: toggle between two children (icon swap, hamburger)
swap.what: Toggle between two child elements driven by a checkbox or class.
swap.when: - Theme toggles, hamburger ↔ close icons, play ↔ pause.

tab.what: Tab strip — radio-driven (CSS-only, supports content panels per tab) or anchor-driven (just visual styling).

table.what: Themed `<table>` with zebra rows, hover highlight, pinned rows/cols.

text-rotate.short: cycle through words in place (CSS animation)
text-rotate.what: CSS-only animated text that cycles through a list of words/phrases.

textarea.when:
- Multi-line text input.
- For single-line text input, use **input**.

theme-controller.what: A control that — when checked — sets `data-theme` on its enclosing `:has(...)` ancestor. CSS-only theme switching.
theme-controller.when: - Theme switchers (light/dark toggles, dropdown of all themes).
theme-controller.classes: `theme-controller` on the input/checkbox; the input's `value` becomes the applied theme name.

timeline.what: Event timeline with start/middle/end slots per item; supports horizontal and vertical, single- or two-sided layouts.

toast.what: Fixed-position container for transient notifications. Position via `toast-start|center|end` × `toast-top|middle|bottom`.
toast.when:
- Transient feedback ("saved", "copied", "error sending").
- For inline persistent feedback, use **alert**.

toggle.what: Sliding on/off switch — a styled `<input type="checkbox">`.
toggle.when:
- Boolean settings where switch metaphor fits.
- For multi-select lists, use **checkbox**.

tooltip.what: Hover/focus tooltip; content from `data-tip` or a child `tooltip-content` element.
tooltip.when:
- Short hints on icon-only buttons or controls.
- For longer content panels, use **dropdown**.
tooltip.classes: `tooltip`; position `tooltip-top|bottom|left|right`; color `tooltip-primary|…`; modifier `tooltip-open` to force-show; `data-tip="…"` for text content.

validator.short: show validation message tied to a form input
validator.what: Companion to **input** / **select** / **textarea** that styles the input based on `:invalid` and shows a `validator-hint` message.
validator.when: - Inline form-field validation feedback driven by native HTML constraints.
validator.classes: `validator` on the input; `validator-hint` on the message element.
